name: BitNet-1.58 Ternary HydraMLP
blurb: Non-record SP1024 1xH100 10-minute run demonstrating BitNet-1.58 ternary fake-quantization on the HydraMLP gate_up and down weights of a bifurcated local-global recurrent LM. Per-group buffered_absmean scale gives an exact training/eval roundtrip; the ternary export trades roughly +0.029 BPB for about 4.8 MB of artifact headroom versus a comparable int4 local-global baseline. Useful when the 16 MB artifact cap is the binding constraint.
